name: libarchive-cpio-perl
title: libarchive-cpio-perl
summary: module for manipulations of cpio archives
description:
module for manipulations of cpio archives
Archive::Cpio provides a few functions to read and write cpio files.
.
It allows one to read and write cpio files, to list, add, and remove
elements, and to manipulate them on the fly.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cpio-filter because module for manipulations of cpio archives.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cpio-filter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cpio-filter [--exclude <PATTERN>] [--in-place] [<cpio file>]` as documented upstream for cpio-filter.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cpio-filter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cpio-filter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install libarchive-cpio-perl. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cpio-filter [--exclude <PATTERN>] [--in-place] [<cpio file>]`. module for manipulations of cpio archives.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: module for manipulations of cpio archives.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: module for manipulations of cpio archives.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install libarchive-cpio-perl
Install with: sudo apt install libarchive-cpio-perl
